CreateDeviceActivationQrCode.description: Grants permission to create a QR code for a Device Instance

CreateDeviceConfigurationTemplate.description: Grants permission to create a Device Configuration Template

CreateDeviceInstance.description: Grants permission to create a Device Instance

CreateDeviceInstanceConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create a Device Instance Configuration

CreateSite.description: Grants permission to create a Site

DeleteAssociatedDevice.description: Grants permission to disassociate Device from a Device Instance

DeleteDeviceConfigurationTemplate.description: Grants permission to delete a Device Configuration Template

DeleteDeviceInstance.description: Grants permission to delete a Device Instance

DeleteSite.description: Grants permission to delete a Site

DeleteUserV1.description: Grants permission to delete a User

GetDeviceConfigurationTemplate.description: Grants permission to view a Device Configuration Template

GetDeviceInstance.description: Grants permission to view a Device Instance

GetDeviceInstanceConfiguration.description: Grants permission to view a Device Instance Configuration

GetSite.description: Grants permission to view a Site

GetSiteAddress.description: Grants permission to view address of a Site

ListDeviceConfigurationTemplates.description: Grants permission to retrieve list of Device Configuration Templates

ListDeviceInstances.description: Grants permission to retrieve list of Device Instances

ListSites.description: Grants permission to view list of Sites

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for an Amazon One Enterprise resource

ListUsers.description: Grants permission to view list of Users

ListUsersV1.description: Grants permission to view list of Users

RebootDevice.description: Grants permission to reboot Device associated with a Device Instance

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to an Amazon One Enterprise resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from an Amazon One Enterprise resource

UpdateDeviceConfigurationTemplate.description: Grants permission to update a Device Configuration Template

UpdateDeviceInstance.description: Grants permission to update a Device Instance

UpdateSite.description: Grants permission to update a Site

UpdateSiteAddress.description: Grants permission to update address of a Site

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by using tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by using tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
